description: Letter in Arabic script. Addressed to [...] al-Malikī al-Nāṣirī. Dating: Probably Mamluk era. 'warada l-musharraf al-karīm al-ṣādir ʿan al-majlis al-ʿāl... wa-ʿalima jamīʿ ma sharaḥahu wa-ammā mā dhakarahu bi-sabab al-bighāl...' Mentions mules, wheat and someone asking for an extension for paying their debts. Needs further examination for content.
